basic_details.job_title: CPCL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 60 Junior Engineering Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chennai Petroleum Corporation Limited (CPCL) has released a short notification for Non-Executive Recruitment 2026. The organisation invites applications from eligible candidates for Junior Engineering Assistant - IV posts in various disciplines. As per the notification, CPCL has announced a total of 60 vacancies for Production, Mechanical, Electrical and Instrumentation disciplines. Interested candidates can check the detailed notification and apply online through the official website of CPCL once the application link is activated.

important_dates.raw: Notification Date: 23-07-2026 Starting Date for Apply Online: Not Mentioned Last Date for Apply Online: Not Mentioned

salary_details.details: Selected candidates for Junior Engineering Assistant - IV posts will receive a pay scale of Rs. 25,000 - 1,05,000/-.

how_to_apply: Click on the online application link.
Fill in the required details in the application form.
Submit the application form before the closing date.
Take a printout of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CPCL Non-Executive Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Chennai Petroleum Corporation Limited has announced vacancies for Junior Engineering Assistant - IV posts in different technical disciplines. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for CPCL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates interested in CPCL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 should check the detailed notification for educational qualification, experience and other eligibility requirements. The short notification has announced vacancies for Junior Engineering Assistant - IV posts in Production, Mechanical, Electrical and Instrumentation disciplines.

content_sections.heading: CPCL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Selected candidates for Junior Engineering Assistant - IV posts will receive a pay scale of Rs. 25,000 - 1,05,000/-.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CPCL Non-Executive Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official CPCL website. Open the Recruitment section. Read the detailed notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Complete the registration process. Fill in the required details in the application form. Upload the required documents. Submit the application form before the closing date. Take a printout of the submitted application form for future reference.
